channel.title: Dashboard on theplaybook
channel.description: Recent content in Dashboard on theplaybook

item.title: King's County Housing Sales Dashboard
item.description: King County, WA Housing Insights Line Chart: The line chart shows daily prices from May 1, 2014, to May 1, 2015, with a general upward trend over the year with some fluctuations. Housing prices climb from an average of $0.5M to $1M by November 2014, before peaking at $1.3M in May 2015. The zip codes with the highest average price are 98109, 98105, 98004, and 98040, all between $0.9M to $1M.
